responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Complete IVX Holdings production acceptance (Build 35 done, verified) and fix P0 IVX Owner AI failures: OpenAI provider/model adapter mismatch and execution guard blocking valid developer output

## Constraints & Preferences
- ONLY the existing Expo React Native app is approved ‚Äî no separate Kotlin app, no second Expo project
- Approved Android package: `com.ivxholdings.app`
- Use `bun x` / `bunx` not `npx`
- Never ask user for credentials ‚Äî find them in project or work around blocker
- No secret values in logs, screenshots, reports
- Owner email: `Iperez4242@gmail.com`
- API base: `https://api.ivxholding.com`
- Do NOT create new providers or architecture ‚Äî modify EXISTING codebase only
- Production APK must NOT depend on Metro, localhost, 127.0.0.1, 10.0.2.2, ngrok, tunnel URLs, or any Vercel hosting URL
- All `ai-gateway.vercel.sh` references fully removed ‚Äî replaced with direct OpenAI API (`api.openai.com/v1`)
- All Rork references fully removed from Expo app and backend
- Do not mark anything "verified" without runtime evidence ‚Äî code-level PASS is not runtime proof
- P0 recovery: DO NOT return plan only, DO NOT return narrative claims, DO NOT mark VERIFIED without real test evidence, DO NOT ask for credentials unless runtime request returns 401/403/expired/revoked
- P0 mandatory final response format required (TASK UNDERSTOOD, ROOT CAUSES, FILES INSPECTED, FILES CHANGED, etc.)

## Progress
### Done
- **Build 35 APK completed, uploaded, and verified end-to-end on physical device by owner**
  - APK: 84,589,615 bytes, SHA-256 `2d8a2b8aea776c9695bde8a03480a90284035def1db2d1f4869f842db42c3867`, versionCode 35
  - Download: `https://github.com/ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest/releases/download/v1.4.3-build35/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build35.apk`
  - GitHub Release ID: 354803487, tag `v1.4.3-build35`
  - Embedded SHA: `9de5d8594dc73791b51ac02fa2c76c8c5d9379f8`, buildMarker `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_16_BUILD_35_CRM_INDEPENDENT_TILES`
  - User confirmed: "Verified end to end"
- **CRM fix verified with live backend data** ‚Äî all 5 CRM endpoints healthy with real session token
- **Build 34 completed and uploaded** ‚Äî superseded by Build 35

### P0 Fixes Completed (Phases 1-3)
- **Phase 1 baseline captured**:
  - Git HEAD before fix: `10e0868612e53da14b4ca584a22eebf273edf84e` (main branch)
  - Render `/health`: healthy, aiEndpoint=`https://api.openai.com/v1/gpt-4o` (invalid), aiProvider=chatgpt, openAIModel=gpt-4o
  - `ai@6.0.194` installed in expo/node_modules (supports spec v2 and v3 only, NOT v4)
  - `@ai-sdk/openai@4.0.15` in lockfile ‚Üí depends on `@ai-sdk/provider@4.0.3` (spec v4) ‚Äî incompatible
  - Bun 1.3.9, Node v22.22.0
- **Phase 2 ‚Äî OpenAI provider/model routing FIXED**:
  - Downgraded `@ai-sdk/openai` from `4.0.15` ‚Üí `3.0.85` (spec v3, compatible with `ai@6.0.218`)
  - Lockfile aligned: `@ai-sdk/openai@3.0.85` ‚Üí `@ai-sdk/provider@3.0.14` (spec v3), `ai@6.0.218` ‚Üí `@ai-sdk/provider@3.0.13` (spec v3)
  - `getIVXAIEndpoint()` in `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts` fixed ‚Äî no longer embeds model name in URL path; returns base URL only (`https://api.openai.com/v1`)
  - All 5 `${baseURL}/${model}` endpoint constructions in `ivx-ai-runtime.ts` replaced with `baseURL` / `successfulBaseUrl`
  - Added `validateIVXAIStartup()` ‚Äî checks provider, model, adapter version, key loaded, base URL; never exposes key value
  - Added `generateTraceId()` ‚Äî produces `ivx-trace-{uuid_prefix}` for request correlation
  - Added trace ID to `normalizeGatewayFailure()` ‚Äî attached as non-enumerable property on error
  - Startup validation wired into `/health` endpoint in `backend/hono.ts`
  - Fixed TS error: `runtime: 'openai_direct'` ‚Üí `runtime: 'ivx_ai_gateway'` in `getIVXAIConfigurationSnapshot`
- **Phase 3 ‚Äî Execution guard FIXED**:
  - `BANNED_NARRATIVE_PHRASES` in `backend/services/ivx-developer-execution-guard.ts` reduced from 40+ to 7 entries
  - Removed false-positive phrases: "starting implementation", "i will inspect", "i will patch", "i will validate", "i will fix", "i will implement", "and return only files changed", "i reviewed", "i prepared", "i initialized", "i will begin", "i will start", "development phase", "schema planning", "i am ready to", "i would", "phase 1-4"
  - Kept genuine planning-only patterns: "awaiting approval", "once approved", "architecture proposal", "execution plan", "implementation plan", "development plan", "next steps required", "next steps:"
  - Removed canned promise paths in `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts`:
    - `developmentActionIntent` path (line ~7284): only `public_deploy` gets canned confirmation; `implementation_task`, `keyboard_overlap_fix`, `owner_brain_proof` now route to real `self_developer` runtime
    - `developmentAuditResult` path (line ~7634): set to `null` ‚Äî no longer produces canned "I will inspect..." text
- **Phase 7 ‚Äî Regression tests added**:
  - `backend/services/ivx-p0-provider-guard.regression.test.ts` ‚Äî 10 tests covering provider compat, endpoint URL, guard phrases, trace IDs
  - All 42 guard+format tests pass (10 new P0 + 32 existing)
  - 1201/1255 backend tests pass (54 pre-existing failures in finance ledger/agent loop, unrelated to P0)
- **Phase 6 ‚Äî Connection audit completed**:
  - `GET /health` ‚Üí HTTP 200 (0.15s)
  - `GET /version` ‚Üí HTTP 200 (0.12s)
  - `GET /readiness` ‚Üí HTTP 200 (0.09s)
  - `GET /` ‚Üí HTTP 200 (0.11s)
  - `GET /diagnostics` ‚Üí HTTP 200 (0.13s)
  - `GET /messages` ‚Üí HTTP 401 (auth required, expected)
  - `GET /rooms` ‚Üí HTTP 401 (auth required, expected)
  - `GET /api/ivx/audit-report` ‚Üí HTTP 401 (auth required, expected)
  - `GET /api/ivx/owner-ai` ‚Üí HTTP 200
  - `GET /api/multimodal/status` ‚Üí HTTP 200
  - `POST /api/ivx/owner-ai` ‚Üí HTTP 401 (auth required, expected)
  - `POST /public/chat` ‚Üí HTTP 200 (1.54s ‚Äî AI responding)
  - `GET chat.ivxholding.com` ‚Üí HTTP 200
  - `GET /socket.io/` ‚Üí HTTP 404 (socket.io path may differ)
  - GitHub API ‚Üí HTTP 200
- **Git push succeeded**: commit `000d52e` on `origin/main` (7 files changed, 289 insertions, 68 deletions)

### In Progress
- **Phase 9-10 ‚Äî Deploy and verify production**:
  - Render auto-deploy from GitHub `main` pending ‚Äî health endpoint still shows old commit `5d7126d6`, bootTime `2026-07-15T23:25:45.630Z`
  - `RENDER_API_KEY` and `RENDER_SERVICE_ID` env vars not available in sandbox ‚Äî cannot trigger manual deploy
  - Polled health endpoint multiple times over ~5 minutes ‚Äî no new deployment detected yet
  - Local smoke tests all pass: startup validation, endpoint check, trace ID, guard fixes

### Blocked
- **Render deployment not yet live** ‚Äî auto-deploy webhook may be delayed or not triggered. Cannot manually trigger without `RENDER_API_KEY` in sandbox environment.
- **Supabase password grant returns `unsupported_grant_type`** ‚Äî password auth via `POST /auth/v1/token?grant=password` fails for owner account. Workaround: magic link via admin API + OTP verification works.

## Key Decisions
- `@ai-sdk/openai` downgraded to `3.0.85` (not upgrading `ai` to v7+) ‚Äî minimal change, restores spec v3 compatibility
- `getIVXAIEndpoint()` returns base URL only ‚Äî model name is NOT part of the endpoint URL; the `@ai-sdk/openai` provider handles model-to-route routing internally (chat/completions or responses)
- Execution guard banned phrases reduced to 7 genuine planning-only patterns ‚Äî in-progress phrases like "starting implementation" are valid worker states; missing-sections check already catches promise-only answers
- Canned promise paths removed for `implementation_task`, `keyboard_overlap_fix`, `owner_brain_proof` ‚Äî only `public_deploy` keeps canned confirmation (correctly asks owner before live infra changes)
- `app.config.ts` SHA resolution: `EXPO_PUBLIC_SOURCE_COMMIT_SHA` env var takes priority over `git rev-parse HEAD` ‚Äî needed because Rork git router rewrites commit SHAs on push
- CRM tiles split into independent queries ‚Äî each tile has its own `useQuery` with unique `queryKey: ['crm-badge', '<tile>']`
- `expo-location` physically removed from `node_modules` ‚Äî `expo-modules.config.json` exclusion alone was insufficient
- Release keystore regenerated for Build 35 (cert SHA-256 `66:3C:CC:...`)
- Render service: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0`, autoDeploy=yes from GitHub `main` branch
- Supabase project: `kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`, anon key embedded in `expo/lib/supabase-env.ts`
- GitHub repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`, default branch `main`
- Owner Supabase user ID: `9b280e15-f9fd-459f-bf2d-530b1ed84cb1`
- Root `package.json` is the backend dependency manifest (not `backend/package.json`)

## Next Steps
- **Wait for Render deployment** to go live ‚Äî poll `/health` for `aiStartupValidation` field and new commit SHA
- **Verify production** after deploy: check `aiEndpoint` no longer contains model name, `aiStartupValidation` shows `adapterVersion: 3.0.85`
- **Send real test message** through production IVX Owner AI (`POST /api/ivx/owner-ai` with owner auth)
- **Execute one controlled developer task** ‚Äî inspect harmless file, run validation command, return structured proof
- **Verify attachment upload** ‚Äî send screenshot, confirm AI can analyze without crashing
- **Confirm message persistence** ‚Äî restart/reload and verify chat history persists
- **Complete P0 mandatory final response format** with all production proof fields

## Critical Context
- **P0 commit**: `000d52e` ‚Äî "P0 FIX: AI provider adapter mismatch + execution guard false positives" on `origin/main`
- **Render still serving old deploy**: commit `5d7126d6`, bootTime `2026-07-15T23:25:45.630Z` ‚Äî new deployment pending
- **Root `package.json`**: `@ai-sdk/openai: "3.0.85"`, `ai: "^6.0.168"` ‚Äî versions now compatible
- **Lockfile**: `@ai-sdk/openai@3.0.85` ‚Üí `@ai-sdk/provider@3.0.14`, `ai@6.0.218` ‚Üí `@ai-sdk/provider@3.0.13` ‚Äî both spec v3
- **Startup validation output** (local): `adapterVersion: 3.0.85`, `keyLoaded: false` (no key in sandbox), `baseUrl: https://api.openai.com/v1`, `endpoint: https://api.openai.com/v1` (no model name)
- **Guard test results**: 42 pass, 0 fail ‚Äî all existing tests still pass with reduced banned phrase list
- **Backend test results**: 1201 pass, 54 fail (pre-existing, finance/agent loop, unrelated to P0)
- **Pre-existing P0 failures now fixed in code**: FAILURE 1 (spec v4 mismatch), FAILURE 2 (guard false positives), FAILURE 3 (invalid endpoint URL)
- **Awaiting production verification**: need live Render deploy + real owner-chat message + developer-worker execution evidence before marking VERIFIED

## Relevant Files
- `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts` ‚Äî AI runtime wrapper; FIXED: `getIVXAIEndpoint()` no longer embeds model name, added `validateIVXAIStartup()`, `generateTraceId()`, trace IDs in `normalizeGatewayFailure()`, all `${baseURL}/${model}` patterns replaced
- `backend/services/ivx-developer-execution-guard.ts` ‚Äî Execution guard; FIXED: `BANNED_NARRATIVE_PHRASES` reduced from 40+ to 7 entries
- `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts` ‚Äî Owner AI API handler; FIXED: canned promise paths removed for `implementation_task`/`keyboard_overlap_fix`/`owner_brain_proof`, only `public_deploy` keeps canned; `developmentAuditResult` set to null
- `backend/hono.ts` ‚Äî Hono server; FIXED: `validateIVXAIStartup` import added, startup validation in `/health` endpoint
- `backend/services/ivx-p0-provider-guard.regression.test.ts` ‚Äî NEW: 10 P0 regression tests (provider compat, endpoint, guard, trace IDs)
- `package.json` ‚Äî Root package manifest; `@ai-sdk/openai` changed from `^4.0.15` to `^3.0.85`
- `bun.lock` ‚Äî Lockfile aligned; `@ai-sdk/openai@3.0.85` with `@ai-sdk/provider@3.0.14`
- `backend/services/ivx-ai-provider-fallback.ts` ‚Äî Multi-provider fallback chain (unchanged)
- `backend/services/ivx-senior-developer-answer-format.ts` ‚Äî Renders runtime proof into strict execution format (unchanged)
- `backend/services/ivx-senior-developer-runtime.ts` ‚Äî `runIVXSeniorDeveloperTask` function (unchanged)
- `backend/api/owner-multimodal.ts` ‚Äî Owner multimodal routes; uses `createOpenAI` (unchanged, now gets v3)
- `backend/services/ivx-image-generation.ts` ‚Äî Image generation; lazy-imports `@ai-sdk/openai` (unchanged, now gets v3)
- `backend/public-chat-ai.ts` ‚Äî Public chat AI; imports `getIVXAIEndpoint` (unchanged, benefits from fix)
- `render.yaml` ‚Äî Render service config; autoDeploy from GitHub `main`, buildCommand uses bun
- `expo/app.config.ts` ‚Äî Expo config; versionCode 35, buildMarker `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_16_BUILD_35_CRM_INDEPENDENT_TILES`
- `expo/app/(tabs)/crm.tsx` ‚Äî CRM dashboard screen; 5 independent `useQuery` hooks with cached-first AsyncStorage
